extension.summary: Lite Stream Cinema movies and series sorted by CSFD rating
Odlahcena verzia Stream Cinema filmov a serialov zoradenych podla CSFD
Odlehcena verze Stream Cinema filmu a serialu serazenych podle CSFD
extension.description: A lighter Kolop variant focused on faster Kodi startup. It keeps CSFD-sorted movie and series rows, trims the home payload, and prewarms only the most important widgets.
Odlahcena verzia Kolopu zamerana na rychlejsi start Kodi. Zachovava CSFD zoradenie pre filmy a serialy, zmensuje home payload a prewarmuje iba najdolezitejsie widgety.
Odlehcena verze Kolopu zamerena na rychlejsi start Kodi. Zachovava CSFD razeni pro filmy a serialy, zmensuje home payload a prewarmuje jen nejdulezitejsi widgety.
extension.news: v1.0.0 (2026-04-08) - Added a startup-focused Lite variant with a lower default item limit and smaller prewarm set - Kept CSFD-sorted movie and series widgets while trimming the default home workload - Limited background warmup to the most important rows for faster cold starts
